legend.note: PASS only after the verify step actually passes. FAIL = not done, broken, or unverified.
legend.priority: lower number = higher priority; agent picks the highest-priority FAIL

features.name: Security & production-hardening review pass (checklist + threat-model step)
features.verify: templates/SECURITY_CHECKLIST.md exists; SPRINT_CONTRACT has Threat model section; REVIEW_CHECKLIST has security gate; README lists 6 templates; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Reviewer approved SEC-001 with SEC-001b as one docs-only unit; stacking rule waived for docs-only changes.

features.name: Review Packet protocol (ephemeral executor→reviewer context handoff)
features.verify: templates/REVIEW_PACKET.md exists; REVIEW_CHECKLIST split into Tier1/Tier2; EXECUTOR_HANDOFF emits packet; HARNESS.md has 'Review the packet' subsection; .gitignore has .harness/; README lists 7 templates; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Reviewer verified packet sufficiency from the packet alone; ephemeral packet deleted after PASS.

features.name: Default-branch field in agent context
features.verify: templates/AGENTS.md has a generic Default branch placeholder under How we work here; no real branch name is hardcoded; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Docs-only context field for project default branch.

features.name: Self-enforcing Review Packet criteria keying
features.verify: templates/REVIEW_PACKET.md has the two-step fill instruction; warns not to substitute handoff verify-steps; per-criterion table columns unchanged; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Apply before emitting packets so evidence rows are keyed to contract criteria.

features.name: Harness-workflow safety (prompt-injection defense, human-gated side effects, least-privilege executor)
features.verify: HARNESS.md has Workflow safety after the control audit with observed-content, human-gated side effects, and least-privilege principles; REVIEW_CHECKLIST Tier 2 has Workflow safety checkboxes; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Process docs only; no enforcement code or tooling.

features.name: Machine-readable criteria block for contract, handoff, and packet
features.verify: SPRINT_CONTRACT has a canonical criteria fenced block; EXECUTOR_HANDOFF carries a criteria block and tells the Executor to paste it verbatim into the packet; REVIEW_PACKET says to paste the handoff criteria block; table columns unchanged; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Docs-only data contract for computational criteria keying; no enforcement tooling.

features.name: One-command kit installer
features.verify: install.sh exists, is executable, POSIX sh, copies kit files, scaffolds AGENTS.md and FEATURES.json only when absent, updates target .gitignore idempotently, runs twice against a throwaway git repo without duplicate lines or overwrites, README has Install section, root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Installer performs no git stage/commit/push and no network calls.

features.name: Brownfield adoption detects repo's existing default branch (don't assume main)
features.verify: ADOPTION.md A1 instructs detecting the default branch via git and writing it to the AGENTS.md Default-branch field; ADOPTION.md states the adopt-don't-impose principle; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Surfaced during a field test where the generator defaulted to 'main' when the convention is to use the repo's existing default. Principle generalizes to all repo conventions, not just branch name.
